title: HealingBed
description: Looking for a way to heal your character faster in Minecraft? Now you can do it while you sleep with our Healing Bed modification.
body:
# Healing Bed
Looking for a way to heal your character faster in Minecraft?
Now you can do it while you sleep with our healing bed modification.
This unique feature allows your character to heal faster during a night's rest,
so you'll have more strength and health to continue exploring the game world.
Install our mod and see how your character will recover faster than ever before!
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2kPukywy/images/de4c3216b809339352e725d8a600ea824745e91d.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2kPukywy/images/e4ef905509eb8ca2afbcae07cfe78b330c866269.png)
